one_time_description: Contingent asset - ongoing flooding claim settlement approved September 2019, expected combined settlement of $79.9 million from Canada and Ontario, pending ratification and execution
economic_notes: Paagitoon Limited Partnership (99.9% owned GBE) provides janitorial services, became self-sustaining in FY2020 with revenues of $1,312,860 and net income of $275,626. Impact Benefit Agreement with New Gold Inc. for Rainy River Project providing minimum $125,000/year metal production payments, minimum $125,000/year royalty payments, and $50,000/year education payments. Community centre under construction with estimated total cost of $3.2 million. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (ended March 31, 2020), not 2024. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Naotkamegwanning Education Authority, Naotkamegwanning Health and Social Services, and Shawendaasowin Child and Family Services. One GBE: Paagitoon Limited Partnership (janitorial services, 99.9% owned, modified equity method). Housing unit count estimated at 56 from CMHC mortgage references (9+12+10+10+7+8 units). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Net debt of $2,425,285 reported on statement of changes in net debt. Contingent asset of $79.9 million flooding claim settlement approved but not yet finalized. COVID-19 subsequent event disclosed. Trust funds held by ISC excluded from financial statements per Note 11.
